summary: Comprehensive testing analysis of Talk-to-My-Lawyer application - a sophisticated legal letter drafting platform with multi-role authentication, AI-powered letter generation, and attorney review workflows. Infrastructure deployment issues prevent full end-to-end testing.

critical_bugs.issue: Production domain www.talk-to-my-lawyer.com returns 502 Bad Gateway error
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot access the live application

critical_bugs.issue: Missing environment variables prevent local development server startup
critical_bugs.impact: Cannot test full application functionality locally

configuration_issues.issue: Required environment variables missing: DATABASE_URL, SUPABASE keys, STRIPE keys, API keys for AI services
configuration_issues.impact: Application cannot start without proper configuration

deployment_issues.issue: www.talk-to-my-lawyer.com not accessible due to server error
deployment_issues.impact: Cannot test UI components and user flows

infrastructure_validation.issue: TypeScript compiles cleanly with 0 errors - frontend code is healthy
Well-structured React components with proper routing for multi-role application

passed_tests: Comprehensive test coverage across 28 test files
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix production deployment - www.talk-to-my-lawyer.com returns 502 error. Configure required environment variables for local development. The codebase is solid with 590 passing tests, but infrastructure prevents user testing.

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All unit tests passing, code compiles cleanly
success_percentage.frontend: 0% - Cannot access UI due to deployment issues

architecture_analysis.application_type: Legal letter drafting platform with AI integration

technology_stack.authentication: Supabase Auth with role-based access control
